agenda_briefs.title: Proposed: Relax lot coverage to 44.37% for 4475 Parker Street
agenda_briefs.summary: Council will consider an appeal to relax the maximum lot coverage rule in Burnaby's Zoning Bylaw for a property at 4475 Parker Street. If approved, this would allow the owner to build a rear primary dwelling unit in addition to the existing single-family home and its secondary suite. The current bylaw limits lot coverage for small-scale multi-unit dwellings (3 to 4 units), and this proposal would increase that limit to 44.37%.
agenda_briefs.action_required: If you own property nearby or are affected by lot coverage rules, contact Burnaby planning staff to express your views before the council vote.
agenda_briefs.source_body:
4.1
BOV #6534 - 4475 Parker Street
APPEAL: An appeal for the relaxation of Section 101.4 "Maximum Lot Coverage" of the Burnaby Zoning Bylaw requirement for small-scale multi-unit dwelling 3 to 4 units which, if permitted, would allow for the building of a rear primary dwelling unit in addition to the existing single family dwelling with a secondary suite.

_skipped.headline: Minutes of the Board of Variance hearing held on May 4, 2026
